title: 日本ダービーの後に・逃したのは誰

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After failing to seize first place in the Japanese
Derby, King Halo bites her lip in frustration. She
tries to put on a brave front despite the loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her mother calls to praise Special Week's
performance and urge King Halo to give up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before hanging up, her mother coldly advises her
to come home before she disgraces herself even
further. I watch tears well up in King Halo's eyes
as she makes another vow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She promises to win the final round of the Classic
Triple Crown tour and declares that her skill
deserves to be recognized.
